hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command','').lower(); bad=any(x in cmd for x in ['drop table','truncate table','delete from','pragma journal_mode=delete']); bad and sys.stderr.write('Direct destructive SQL blocked by hook\n'); exit(2 if bad else 0)"
